reference: I had a blackhead that did not open, and over time it became larger and appeared swollen. The doctor used a laser to open the blackhead and remove the debris. It has been more than a year since that procedure, and the hole created by the laser incision has not healed. I now have a hole in my face where debris gets in all the time. Please help.
text: I had a blackhead that did not open, and over time it became larger and appeared swollen. The doctor used a laser to open the blackhead and remove the debris. It has been more than a year since that procedure, and the hole created by the laser incision has not healed. I now have a hole in my face where debris gets in all the time. Please help.
